test_case_description: Well-formed story (role, value, testable AC) - expected gate_pass=true
query: As a back-office operator, I want to filter executed orders by settlement date, so that I can reconcile end-of-day positions. Acceptance criteria: Given a settlement date, When I apply the filter, Then only orders settling on that date are shown. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Well-formed export story with clear AC - expected gate_pass=true
query: As a compliance analyst, I want to export the daily trade blotter to CSV, so that I can submit the regulatory report. Acceptance criteria: Given the blotter, When I click export, Then a CSV of executed trades is produced. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Well-formed real-time positions story with measurable AC - expected gate_pass=true
query: As a desk trader, I want to see real-time positions per instrument, so that I can manage intraday risk. Acceptance criteria: Given an open position, When the price updates, Then the unrealised P&L refreshes within two seconds. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Vague one-liner, no role/value/AC - expected gate_pass=false
query: We need a fast dashboard for trades. Evaluate this story.
ground_truth: {'classification': 'needs_refinement', 'gate_pass': false, 'issues': ['vague or ambiguous wording', 'missing acceptance criteria', 'missing user value', 'missing user role', 'not testable']}

test_case_description: Generic role, missing AC and user value - expected gate_pass=false
query: As a user I want reports. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Subjective wording, not testable, no role/AC - expected gate_pass=false
query: Build a user-friendly and intuitive settlement screen that is performante and easy to use. Evaluate this story.
ground_truth: {'classification': 'needs_refinement', 'gate_pass': false, 'issues': ['vague or ambiguous wording', 'missing acceptance criteria', 'missing user value', 'missing user role', 'not testable']}

test_case_description: Oversized scope spanning many modules - expected issue 'too large, not small'
query: As an operator, I want to manage orders and positions and counterparties and limits and reports and alerts and exports, so that everything is in one place. Acceptance criteria: Given the screen, When I open it, Then the modules are available. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Has role and value but no concrete AC - expected issue 'missing acceptance criteria'
query: As a risk manager I want a limit-breach alert, so that I can react quickly. The alert should be reliable. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Well-formed failed-settlement story with clear AC - expected gate_pass=true
query: As a settlement clerk, I want to flag failed settlements, so that I can chase the counterparty. Acceptance criteria: Given a settlement marked failed, When I open the failures view, Then the item appears with its counterparty and amount. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Well-formed cancel-order story with measurable AC - expected gate_pass=true
query: As a trader, I want to cancel a pending order, so that I avoid erroneous execution. The order must disappear from the book within one second and a confirmation is logged. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Vague improvement request, no role/value/AC - expected gate_pass=false
query: Make the reconciliation faster. Evaluate this story.
ground_truth: {'classification': 'needs_refinement', 'gate_pass': false, 'issues': ['vague or ambiguous wording', 'missing acceptance criteria', 'missing user value', 'missing user role', 'not testable']}

test_case_description: Story with external prerequisite - expected issue 'unstated dependency'
query: As an analyst, I want the new netting logic, but it depends on the Tobin tax module being migrated first. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Well-formed audit-log story with detailed AC - expected gate_pass=true
query: As an auditor, I want an immutable log of order amendments, so that I can trace who changed what. Acceptance criteria: Given an amendment, When it is saved, Then an entry with user, timestamp and old/new values is recorded. Evaluate this story.

test_case_description: Vague and oversized 'make it better' story - expected gate_pass=false
query: As a PM I want everything about the back office to be better and more scalable so that the system is robust. Evaluate this story.
ground_truth: {'classification': 'needs_refinement', 'gate_pass': false, 'issues': ['vague or ambiguous wording', 'missing acceptance criteria', 'too large, not small', 'not testable']}

test_case_description: Implementation task, no role/value/AC - expected gate_pass=false
query: Implement the eseguiti import. Evaluate this story.
